I can't thank you enough joovier. I've never in my 4 years of trading have had this many wins with any strategy. I'd rather have confidence in a proven strategy than to trade a strategy of my own not realizing it has a negative win rate when I trade it and fail for 4 years because my psychological relationship with that strategy didn't fit who I am. I needed something to prove I know how to read the charts, to prove I can manage risk when the strategy actually works and be okay when it doesn't work simply because I KNOW THE STRATEGY WORKS. it's difficult to keep your mind right when the strategy you created actually doesn't work, most traders say stick with the strategy, even if it sucks but then You think something is wrong with you. When in reality, the strategy you use sucks, causing you to go on tilt too often. Thank you joovier.
Awesome, thank you so much bro! God bless you!

Well, this is not a strategy - Trading is actually just gambling and the people that master their emotions better come out on top. In summary, you are telling traders not to take positions around the consolidation area and to only trade break-outs. Thats simple knowledge and not a strategy. Trade break-outs only, dont use  a SL. Simply have a target profit in mind.. Use lot sizes that are manageable to you and close the trade once it hits your target profit and wait to enter again:face-red-droopy-eyes:

Just a recipie for frustration especially if on a spread based broker which most people are...
